comment.body:
coding 5184.70 as the lvl where the puts start to print.
After AM expo happened, MMs will need to buyback a bit. Not too much. 
However, dealers are supplied with net short delta today, due to puts.
If puts are decaying, dealers will become longer delta.
If puts start to print, they become shorter delta. 
So this is "kinda supportive", not a bounce, but supportive in terms of not favoring for black swan, except if some very bad news occurs.

Post OpEx we can get some buyback flows, but after vol is coming back. 
Me personally, I don't like to bet on this upside move, rather short vol, but scaling out, and wait.
Still macro drive nenvironment as I keep saying

comment.body:
And this is why I don’t trust them — I don’t trust the institutions, the universities, etcetc… but it’s not my fault, it’s theirs. Here they label as conspiracy theorists, but it’s just propaganda! People don’t get this simply for lack of information  and misinformation (propaganda again). 
I really hope when Alma says that we are making progress toward a peace, but I’m sure that everyday we’re getting far from it. I can feel them! They are like this😔
I’m really concerned that Alma’s bad scenario has more probability to get realized. 
As it also says in the middle‑school history book, what always comes before every wars? An arms race. We’re well on our way (I really hope I’m wrong).
